changes.value: Had two windows with two boards open. After hot reload, only one window was restored. The Tauri window-state plugin restores window geometry but the second webview window may not survive Vite HMR. Need to verify window persistence across hot reloads and potentially re-create missing windows.
Hot reload only restores one window when two were open
